content.text:
[Fri 2026-05-29 01:23 GMT+8] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/2). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]

请执行备忘录查看操作：

【用户信息】sender_id: 346E6B5AF511B67156BF9130F0FCB06D

操作：
1. cd ~/.openclaw/workspace-son/memo/
2. 执行 SQL：sqlite3 memo.db "SELECT id, content, status FROM memos WHERE sender_id='346E6B5AF511B67156BF9130F0FCB06D' AND status!='deleted' ORDER BY id;"

然后返回给 Father 格式化的文本：
- 有数据则：📋 备忘录列表：\n\n1. [待办] xxx\n2. [已完成] xxx\n（pending 显示 [待办]，completed 显示 [已完成]）
- 无数据则：📋 暂无备忘录

Begin. Execute the assigned task to completion.

content.name: exec

arguments.command: cd ~/.openclaw/workspace-son/memo/ && sqlite3 memo.db "SELECT id, content, status FROM memos WHERE sender_id='346E6B5AF511B67156BF9130F0FCB06D' AND status!='deleted' ORDER BY id;"

content.text:
📋 备忘录列表：

1. [待办] 明天要起床
